It has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. intro: Desmophlebium lechleri, also known as Andean dragon's blood, is a plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America, characterized by its red sap and thick, fleshy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress.
